{{Quote|Snoke Loroan made the trip from here to the Bespin system in fifteen standard time parts. The best the ''Millennium Falcon'' has ever done is eighteen standard time parts. I looked that up in the Jedi Library.|[[Ken]], to [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]|<ref name="The Lost City of the Jedi">''[[The Lost City of the Jedi]]''</ref>}}
'''Snoke Loroan''' was a [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who fought with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. They participated in the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], where they were killed.

They were noted for traveling from [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] to the [[Bespin system/Legends|Bespin system]] in fifteen [[Standard Time Part|standard time parts]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Lost City of the Jedi]]'' {{1stm}}
